yuvalama-yurvarlama-soup-recipe-lezzet.name: Yuvalama (yurvarlama) Soup Recipe

ingredients.item: Dana–a denser and traditional flavor can be achieved using mixed meat.
A lighter version of the whole floor can be preferred.
Fine bulgur or ricenç can be used.
When used Bulgur recommended meatballs 1–2 mins of water are added.
The half of the Unin is irmic, half of rice can be used as boiled.
Rice flour can be preferred for gluten-free option.
It can be added to the same amount of fine meatballs.

A more aromatic broth can be obtained using lamb gerdan or lamb pearl.
A strong bone water can also be preferred for those who do not want to use meat.

The amount of chickpe can be reduced and the number of k&ouml can be increased.
Full oil yogurt (water with a cloth;free) can be used.

1 tablespoon of extra flour or starch can be added by adding binding.
Olive oil or semi-breed olive oil + butter mixture can be used.
In addition to dry mint, the newflower or Kimyon can be added in a very small amount.
Powder red pepper can be preferred instead of chili pepper.
